compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect v2 ticket system removal
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md to reflect v2 removal. Line 160: change to 'Session close: Always use /dso:end to close a session.' Remove any remaining tk or .tickets/ references in CLAUDE.md (lines 60, 65, 68, 70, 127 if applicable after other story changes).
**Why**: CLAUDE.md is the primary context document agents read. It must reflect the v3-only state.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates only
- OUT: All other docs (handled by story 4)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md contains no references to the tk command or .tickets/ directory outside of historical context. Satisfies: Documentation references only the v3 ticket CLI and bridge workflows
- When this story is complete, an agent reading CLAUDE.md encounters only v3 ticket system references. Satisfies: Post-cleanup, an agent encounters only v3 code paths

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: All 2 child tasks closed. Story complete.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
